_doc: Experiment/bench/measurement RESULT signal patterns scanned against the AI AGENT's OWN output (last assistant message) at session Stop — NOT the user prompt. Second trigger leg of `sidecar architecture stop-check`: the FIRST leg is the git diff (uncommitted code/ARCHITECTURE change), which misses the case this file exists for — a turn where a RESULT lands with ZERO local code change (a remote run finished, numbers came back, a bench/verdict was read off a board). A match with NO `🏛️ ARCHITECTURE` accounting line ⇒ decision:block, inducing the agent to update the matching experiment/gate node's result in ARCHITECTURE.json in place (`sidecar architecture search <실험>` → Edit) then report `🏛️ ARCHITECTURE 갱신: <무엇을>` — or, if the result genuinely carries no design consequence, `🏛️ ARCHITECTURE: 변동 없음`. Same marker as the diff leg (no new marker vocabulary), same forgery reconciliation (a 갱신 claim is checked against the actual ARCHITECTURE.json diff). WIDE net by design — precision lives in the agent's judgment (the marker), not the keyword list. Plain substrings, case-insensitive. stop_hook_active bounds it to one block per stop-chain; the marker consumes that signal PER DISTINCT MATCHED SIGNAL per session (no wedge). No file / no patterns → the leg is inert and stop-check degrades to diff-only. Override per-repo at .harness/result-signals.json.
hint: 실험·벤치·측정 결과는 설계 SSOT 에 남는다 (원격 실행/보드 등재만 한 턴 ≠ 결과가 돌아온 턴). `sidecar architecture search <실험/게이트>` 로 해당 노드를 찾아 그 결과·verdict 를 update-in-place 로 제자리 갱신하라 — 별도 report/summary 파일로 흩지 말 것 (commons single-doc).
